steps.title: Set up the equation for equivalent ratios
steps.content: When two ratios are equivalent, we write a proportion: $$\frac{154}{110} = \frac{x}{5}$$

steps.title: Cross-multiply and solve for x
steps.content: Cross-multiply to get $$154 \cdot 5 = 110 \cdot x$$, which simplifies to $$770 = 110x$$. Divide both sides by 110 to find $$x = \frac{770}{110} = 7$$
